  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)

  (:init

    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)

    (on-table b4)

  (:domain blocksworld)

    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 3): b2, b3, b4 (b2 on table, b3 on b2, b4 on b3)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 4): b5, b6, b7, b8 (b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7)
    (on-table b5)

    (on b12 b11)

    (clear b16)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 1
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 3 (b3 on table, b4 on b3, b5 on b4)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 6 (b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on b9, b11 on b10)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 7 (b12 on table, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15, b17 on b16, b18 on b17)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (was on bottom, originally b3-b4-b5)
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on top (was on bottom, originally b6-b7-b8-b9-b10-b11)
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b12 on top (was on bottom, originally b12-b13-b14-b15-b16-b17-b18)
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
    )
  )
)
